[INFORMASI KONTEKS VISUAL GAMBAR]:
- Deskripsi Visual: One screen capture shows a dark-themed messaging or voice-message interface over a patterned background filled with small doodles and icons.

Main Subject:
The main focus is a voice playback interface with horizontal waveform bars, play buttons, timestamps, checkmarks, and microphone icons, appearing in multiple message bubbles.

Setting:
The scene is an indoor, screen-on interface with a dark background. The background is covered with repeated line-drawn doodles and symbols in a lighter gray tone, resembling a chat app conversation view. The lighting is flat and digital, typical of a mobile screen.

Visual Details:
Several dark green message bubbles appear across the middle and upper right, each containing text lines, a triangular play icon, waveform bars made of vertical lines, a small circular indicator, and a time value. Some bubbles show a checkmark symbol at the far right. Another bubble lower left shows the same waveform style and a timestamp. A round orange circular microphone button appears near the center-bottom area of the waveform bubble. Along the bottom, a gray input bar shows a placeholder text area and small icons on the left and right sides. A round green microphone button is visible at the bottom-right corner overlaying the interface. The overall composition is layered, with overlapping chat elements and a timeline-like feel created by the waveform and timestamps. A phone-like status area at the top-left shows small text and a number.

Visible Text:

No other important visible text detected beyond the items above.

Practical Summary:
The image shows a dark chat interface with voice message playback elements, including waveform displays, play icons, and timestamps. It also includes microphone controls and a message input bar at the bottom, all over a doodle-pattern background.

Pertanyaan asli user: Analyze this image for NSFW (Not Safe For Work) / pornographic content / nudity. Reply strictly in JSON format with three fields: 'nsfw' (boolean: true if it contains nudity, porn, suggestive, or nsfw content, false if it is safe/sfw), 'confidence' (number: from 0 to 100 representing the likelihood of nsfw/nudity/suggestive content), and 'label' (string: 'porn', 'nsfw', 'suggestive', or 'safe' depending on the content). Do not include markdown formatting or backticks, just raw JSON.
